summary: Backend API testing for Payment CRUD operations and Freemium model - 11/11 tests passed

success_rate.frontend: N/A - Skipped (React Native/Expo mobile app - cannot be tested via Playwright)

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test coaches and athletes during test execution (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All payment CRUD endpoints tested and working: POST /api/athletes/{id}/payments (adds payment with auto-generated ID), PUT /api/athletes/{id}/payments/{id}?paid=true/false (toggles paid status and updates paid_date), DELETE /api/athletes/{id}/payments/{id} (removes payment, returns 404 for non-existent). Freemium model working correctly: new coaches get 'free' plan, first athlete creation succeeds, second athlete blocked with 403 and message 'Piano gratuito limitato a 1 atleta'. Test coach account: coach@test.com/test123 has athlete 'Marco Atleta' (ID: 05ae746f-edc2-48cf-bd8f-01ef62f69301).

backend_api_tests: TestPaymentCRUD::test_add_payment_to_athlete - PASSED (payment created with ID, persisted in athlete record)
TestPaymentCRUD::test_toggle_payment_paid_status - PASSED (paid=true sets paid_date, paid=false clears it)
TestPaymentCRUD::test_delete_payment - PASSED (payment removed from athlete's payments list)
TestFreemiumModel::test_freemium_second_athlete_blocked - PASSED (403: Piano gratuito limitato a 1 atleta)

positive: Payment endpoints properly check coach authorization before modifying athlete data
DELETE endpoint uses $pull MongoDB operator correctly to remove payment from array
Freemium model correctly limits free tier coaches to 1 athlete
Payment notifications are cleared when new payment is added (avoid stale notifications)
All endpoints return appropriate HTTP status codes (200 success, 404 not found, 403 forbidden)
observations: New coaches get 'free' subscription plan (not 'trial' as mentioned in iteration_1)
Test coach account (coach@test.com) has 1 athlete: Marco Atleta
Backend properly validates ownership - coaches can only manage their own athletes
